title: Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space) enhancements
body: * **Genie Code space authoring skills**: Genie Code now includes dedicated skills for authoring and maintaining Genie Agents (formerly Genie Spaces). See  [Create a Genie Agent](/aws/en/genie/set-up#create) and [Debug responses with Genie Code](/aws/en/genie/monitor#debug-with-genie-code).
